cards.name: Rending Claws
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Carnivore
abilities: [keyword:Digest 4]: Draw two cards.
[keyword:Indigestion]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Gruesome Feast
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Reveal the top card of your deck. You may KO it.

cards.name: Feast or Famine
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 0, KO it and you may repeat this process.

cards.name: Devouring Drool
abilities: [keyword:Digest 3]: You get +2[icon:attack].
[keyword:Indigestion]: You get +2[icon:recruit].
[hc:instinct]: Instead, you get both.

cards.name: Razor Teeth
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Symbiotic Adaptation
abilities: Choose one:
- You get +1[icon:recruit] for each other card you played this turn with a [icon:recruit] icon.
- Or you get +1[icon:attack] for each other card you played this turn with an [icon:attack] icon.

cards.name: Insatiable Hunger
abilities: [keyword:Digest 8]: KO a card from your Victory Pile. You get +6[icon:attack].
[keyword:Indigestion]: KO a card from your hand or discard pile. You get +6[icon:recruit].
[team:venomverse][team:venomverse]: Instead, do both.

cards.name: Hungry for Action
abilities: [keyword:Digest 3]: You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

cards.name: Spring the Trap
abilities: If a Master Strike or Villain that has an Ambush ability was played this turn, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Serious Overkill
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Ultimate Survivor
abilities: When a Master Strike is played, before it takes effect, you may put Ultimate Survivor from your hand on top of your deck. If you do, you may put any card from the HQ into your hand.

cards.name: Cauldron of the Cosmos
abilities: [keyword:Digest 2]: Draw a card.

cards.name: See Future Timelines
abilities: [hc:ranged]: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 0, discard it and you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Complete the Grand Ritual
abilities: If you played a 4-cost card and a 2-cost card this turn, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Crystal of Kadavus
abilities: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Draw one of them, discard one, and KO one.
[team:venomverse][team:venomverse]: Do this ability again.

cards.name: Digest That Chimichanga
abilities: [keyword:Digest 2]: You get +2[icon:attack].
[keyword:Indigestion]: “Rescue“ a Bystander.
[hc:strength]: Instead, you get both.

cards.name: Shenanigans
abilities: Draw two cards. But you can't draw any more cards until the end of this turn.

cards.name: Can I Get a Little Gratitude?
cards.displayName: Can I Get a Little Gratitude?
abilities: Whenever you Rescue a Bystander this turn, do any “rescue“ ability on it an extra time.
[keyword:Excessive Violence]: “Rescue“ a Bystander.

cards.name: Play to the Crowd
abilities: [keyword:Digest 7]: You get +1[icon:attack] for each two Bystanders in your Victory Pile.
[keyword:Indigestion]: “Rescue“ two Bystanders.
[team:venomverse][team:venomverse]: Instead, do both (in order).

cards.name: Hybrid
abilities: If you fight Hybrid while he's bonded to a Villain, defeat that Villain and rescue three Bystanders instead of taking a Tactic.
Always Leads: Life Foundation
Master Strike: A Villain from the city [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Hybrid, If Hybrid was already bonded, then each player gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: Epic Hybrid
abilities: If you fight Hybrid while he's bonded to a Villain, defeat that Villain and rescue three Bystanders instead of taking a Tactic.
Always Leads: Life Foundation
Master Strike: The highest [icon:attack] unbonded Villain from the city and/or Escape Pile [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Hybrid. If no new bond could occur, then each player gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: Alien Awakening
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final tactic, a Henchman Villain from any Victory Pile [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Hybrid.

cards.name: Escaped Monstrosity
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, a Villain from the city or Escape Pile [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Hybrid.

cards.name: Life Foundation Research
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Life Foundation Villain in your Victory Pile.

cards.name: Symbiotic Call
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, reveal the top four cards of the Villain Deck. A Henchman Villain you revealed [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Hybrid. Put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Poison Thanos
abilities: Poison Thanos gets +1[icon:attack] for each different cost among cards in his “Poisoned Souls“ pile.
Always Leads: Poisons
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand and puts one of their non-grey Heroes next to Thanos in a “Poisoned Souls“ pile.

cards.name: Epic Poison Thanos
abilities: Poison Thanos gets +2[icon:attack] for each different cost among cards in his “Poisoned Souls“ pile.
Always Leads: Poisons
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand and puts half (round up) of their non-grey Heroes next to Thanos in a “Poisoned Souls“ pile. Each player that lost no Heroes this way gains a Wound.

cards.name: Desperate Rescue
abilities: Fight: You may gain a Hero from Poison Thanos' “Poisoned Souls“ pile.

cards.name: Poisoned Loyalties
abilities: Fight: Each other player puts a Poisons card from their discard pile into Poison Thanos' “Poisoned Souls“ pile.

cards.name: Searing Poisons
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards a Poisons card from their hand or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Soul Seize
abilities: Fight: Put all Heroes that cost 5 or more from the HQ into Poison Thanos' “Poisoned Souls“ pile.

cards.name: Agony
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. A Villain you revealed [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Agony. Put the rest back in any order.
Escape: Each player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Dr. Carlton Drake
abilities: Fight: Each [hc:instinct] and [hc:tech] Hero currently in the HQ costs 1 less this turn.

cards.name: Lasher
abilities: Ambush: A Henchman Villain from your Victory Pile [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Lasher.

cards.name: Phage
abilities: Ambush: A Villain from the Escape Pile or your Victory Pile [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Phage.

cards.name: Riot
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, it [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Riot.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Scream
abilities: Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Henchman or Life Foundation Villain, it [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with Scream.

cards.name: Poison Captain America
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with another Villain in the city. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
You get +1[icon:attack] for each color of Hero you have. (including [hc:instinct] and grey)

cards.name: Poison Dr. Octopus
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with a Villain in the Bank. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
Draw a card.

cards.name: Poison Hulk
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with a Henchman Villain in the city. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
[hc:strength]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Poison Sabretooth
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with a Villain in the Streets. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
[hc:instinct]: Look at the top card of your deck. You may KO it.

cards.name: Poison Scarlet Witch
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with another Villain in the city with an odd-numbered [icon:attack]. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it has an odd-numbered cost, draw it. (0 is even.)

cards.name: Poison Spider-Man
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with another Villain in the city. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs 2 or less, draw it.

cards.name: Poison Storm
abilities: Fight: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with a Villain on the Rooftops or Bridge. If already bonded or unable to bond, gain this as a Hero instead.
[hc:ranged]: You get +2[icon:attack] usable only against the Mastermind.

cards.name: Symbiotic Armor
abilities: Ambush: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with the Mastermind. When you fight the Mastermind, defeat Symbiotic Armor and KO one of your Heroes instead of taking a Tactic.
Setup: 8 Twists. Add an extra Henchman Group.

Twist: This Twist enters the city as a 3[icon:attack] “Symbiote“ Villain worth 3VP with “Ambush: This [keyword:Symbiote Bonds] with another Villain in the city. Play another card from the Villain Deck.“
Evil Wins: When the Escape Pile has 3 cards per player, or the Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 10 Twists. Wound Stack has 6 Wounds per player.
Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme. If the Streets are empty, put a Bystander there as a “Possessed Psychotic“ Villain. If the Streets weren't empty, each player gains a Wound.
Special Rules: “Possessed Psychotics“ have [icon:attack] equal to the number of Twists next to the Scheme. When you fight one, rescue it as a Bystander.
Evil Wins: When there are 6 Bystanders in the Escape Pile or the Wound Stack runs out.
Setup: 6 Twists. All Bystanders are also “Biochemists.“
Twist: Each player KOs a Biochemist from their Victory Pile or discards down to 4 cards in hand.
Twist 6: Evil Wins!
Setup: 11 Twists. Set aside a second “Drained“ Mastermind and its 4 Tactics, out of play. Add its “Always Leads“ Villains as an extra Villain Group.
Twist 1-4: Shuffle one of the Drained Mastermind's Tactics into the main Mastermind's Tactics.
Twist 6, 8, 10: The Mastermind uses this Twist to copy the Master Strike ability of the Drained Mastermind.
Twist 11: Evil Wins!
Special Rules: If Tactics or Master Strikes mention the Drained Mastermind, use the main Mastermind instead.
